# VIP Transfer

> VIP Transfer (viptransfer.com) is a licensed luxury ground-transportation and travel-agency service based in Istanbul, Turkey, with 26+ years of experience. It provides premium airport transfers, private chauffeur services and intercity luxury travel across 300+ destinations. Service is available 24/7 in Turkish, English and German with fixed, upfront pricing, flight tracking and professional English-speaking drivers.

## Key facts
- Business name: VIP Transfer
- Website: https://viptransfer.com
- Based in: Istanbul, Turkey (Kartal / Marmara Kule)
- Founded: family tourism business with 26+ years of experience
- Languages: Turkish, English, German
- Availability: 24/7 online booking
- Phone: +90 850 255 48 47
- Email: info@viptransfer.com
- Pricing: fixed, upfront prices (no surge pricing); quote shown before booking

## Services
- Airport Transfer: private VIP transfers to/from Istanbul Airport (IST) and Sabiha Gökçen Airport (SAW), including meet & greet and flight tracking.
- Private Chauffeur Service: hourly and daily chauffeur-driven luxury vehicles (Mercedes V-Class / S-Class and equivalents).
- Intercity Transfer: long-distance private transfers such as Istanbul to Bursa and Istanbul to Sapanca.
- Corporate & event transfers, and multi-day travel arrangements.

## Popular pages
- Homepage: https://viptransfer.com/
- Istanbul Airport Transfer: https://viptransfer.com/istanbul-airport-transfer
- Sabiha Gökçen Airport Transfer: https://viptransfer.com/sabiha-gokcen-airport-transfer
- Istanbul VIP Transfer: https://viptransfer.com/istanbul-vip-transfer
- Istanbul Chauffeur Service: https://viptransfer.com/istanbul-chauffeur-service
- Istanbul to Bursa Transfer: https://viptransfer.com/istanbul-to-bursa-transfer
- Istanbul to Sapanca Transfer: https://viptransfer.com/istanbul-to-sapanca-transfer

## Booking
Customers book online at https://viptransfer.com by entering pickup and drop-off locations, date/time and passenger count. A fixed price is shown before confirmation. Airport pickups include flight tracking and a meet & greet at arrivals.

## Policies
- Privacy Policy: https://viptransfer.com/privacy-policy
- Terms & Conditions: https://viptransfer.com/terms-conditions
- Cookie Policy: https://viptransfer.com/cookie-policy
